channel.title: AI 早报
channel.description: AI 早报 的自动更新订阅源

item.title: AI 早报 2026-04-16
item.description: 15 篇精选：ABot-M0: VLA Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation with Action Manifold Learning；GlotOCR Bench: OCR Models Still Struggle Beyond a Handful of Unicode Scripts；LaV-CoT: Language-Aware Visual CoT with Multi-Aspect Reward Optimization for Real-World Multilingual VQA
